core_thesis: Based on extremely sparse caption data (3 posts, near-zero text), @kai_rehagen is a visual-first creator who lets images carry all meaning, using captions as minimal labels or omitting them entirely. This deliberate anti-caption stance positions the work as art objects rather than social content.
key_ideas: Radical caption minimalism — images need no explanation
Photography as art object, not content
Silence and negative space as aesthetic choices
Vernacular titling ('Some Pictures') as deadpan irony
